# Label Seeds

Suggested repository labels:

| Label | Purpose | Color |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `type:feature` | New product or engineering work | `0E8A16` |
| `type:bug` | Defect or regression | `D73A4A` |
| `type:research` | Exploration or spike | `5319E7` |
| `type:docs` | Documentation work | `1D76DB` |
| `type:adr` | Architecture decision work | `6F42C1` |
| `area:core` | Domain and application services | `BFD4F2` |
| `area:cli` | CLI behavior and UX | `C5DEF5` |
| `area:infra` | Config, logging, eventing, environment | `F9D0C4` |
| `area:storage` | SQLite and persistence concerns | `FBCA04` |
| `area:docs` | Vision, roadmap, and contribution docs | `D4C5F9` |
| `area:ci` | CI, automation, and tooling | `BFDADC` |
| `area:voice` | STT, TTS, playback, dictation | `F9D0C4` |
| `area:llm` | Rewrite and summarization integration | `FEF2C0` |
| `area:future-editor` | Deferred editor adapter work | `E4E669` |
| `context:home` | Better suited to deep solo work | `C2E0C6` |
| `context:office` | Better suited to bounded implementation or coordination | `FAD8C7` |
| `size:xs` | Tiny task | `C2E0C6` |
| `size:s` | Small task | `BFDADC` |
| `size:m` | Medium task | `FBCA04` |
| `size:l` | Large task | `D93F0B` |
| `status:blocked` | Waiting on a dependency or decision | `000000` |

See `.github/bootstrap-gh.sh` for `gh` commands that create these labels.
